algorithms.name: HTMLGeolocationElement/constructor()
algorithms.html: The HTMLGeolocationElement constructor() steps are:

steps.html: Initialize the internal [[Features]] to « "geolocation" ».
Initialize the internal [[BlockerList]] to «».
Initialize the internal [[LastNotifiedValidState]] with false.
Initialize the internal [[LastNotifiedInvalidReason]] with the empty string.
Initialize the internal [[watchIDs]] to « watchID », where watchID is an implementation-defined unsigned long that is greater than zero.
Initialize the internal [[position]] to null.
Initialize the internal [[positionError]] to null.
Run PowerfulFeatureObserver’s initialization steps.

algorithms.name: HTMLGeolocationElement/insertion steps
algorithms.html: The HTMLGeolocationElement’s insertion steps are:

steps.html: Initialize the internal [[BlockerList]] to «».
Append this to node navigable’s [[ActivationBlockableElements]].
Initialize the internal [[IntersectionRect]] with undefined.
Initialize the internal [[IntersectionObserver]] with the result of constructing a new IntersectionObserver with IntersectionObserver callback and «[ "rootMargin" → "-4px" ]».
Call [[IntersectionObserver]].observe(this).
Run PowerfulFeatureObserver’s insertion steps.
If this is not type permissible, then add a temporary blocker with unsuccessful_registration.
Add an expiring blocker with reason recently_attached.
If the traversable navigable of the node navigable of this is a fenced navigable, then add a permanent blocker with illegal_subframe.
Maybe dispatch onvalidstatechange on this.
Maybe autolocate.

algorithms.name: HTMLGeolocationElement/removing steps
algorithms.html: The HTMLGeolocationElement removing steps are:

steps.html: Remove this from node navigable’s [[ActivationBlockableElements]].
Recheck type permissibility for this’s node navigable.
Maybe dispatch onvalidstatechange on this.

algorithms.name: HTMLGeolocationElement/activation
algorithms.html: The HTMLGeolocationElement element’s activation behavior given event is:

steps.html: Assert: element’s [[Features]] is not null.
If element’s [[Features]] is empty, then return.
If event.isTrusted is false, then return.
If element.isValid is false, then return.
Let descriptor be the result of build a permission descriptor for element.
Request permission to use the powerful features described by descriptor.
If the previous step was cancelled or dismissed by the user, then dispatch onpromptdismiss on this and return.
Dispatch onpromptaction on this.
Fetch location.

algorithms.name: HTMLGeolocationElement/maybe autolocate
algorithms.html: To <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-for="HTMLGeolocationElement" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="htmlgeolocationelement-maybe-autolocate" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">maybe autolocate</dfn>:

steps.html: If get the current permission state is not granted, then return.
If autolocate is not true, then return.
Fetch location.

algorithms.name: HTMLGeolocationElement/fetch location
algorithms.html: To <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-for="HTMLGeolocationElement" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="htmlgeolocationelement-fetch-location" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">fetch location</dfn>:

steps.html: Let positionCallback be a PositionCallback that performs the following steps:
Set this’s [[positionError]] to undefined.
Set this’s [[position]] to PositionCallback’s position argument.
Dispatch onlocation to this.
Let errorCallback be a PositionErrorCallback that performs the following steps:
Set this’s [[position]] to undefined.
Set this’s [[positionError]] to PositionCallback’s positionError argument.
Dispatch onlocation to this.
Let positionOptions be «[ "enableHighAccuracy" → true ]».
Let geolocation be the relevant global object’s Geolocation.
If this’s watch is true:
ignored: Request a position with geolocation, positionCallback, errorCallback, positionOptions, and this’s [[watchIDs]].

steps.html: Otherwise:
ignored: Request a position with geolocation, positionCallback, errorCallback, positionOptions.

algorithms.name: HTMLGeolocationElement/type permissible
algorithms.html: To determine whether an <var>element</var> is <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-for="HTMLGeolocationElement" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="htmlgeolocationelement-type-permissible" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">type permissible</dfn>:

steps.html: Assert: element’s node navigable’s [[ActivationBlockableElements]] contains element.
Let count be 0.
For each current in element’s node navigable’s [[ActivationBlockableElements]]:
If current is element, then break.
If element.[[Features]] equals current.[[Features]] then increment count by 1.
Return whether count is less than 3.

algorithms.name: HTMLGeolocationElement/recheck type permissibility
algorithms.html:
To <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-for="HTMLGeolocationElement" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="htmlgeolocationelement-recheck-type-permissibility" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">recheck type permissibility</dfn> for a
<var>document</var>:

steps.html: For each current in document’s [[ActivationBlockableElements]]:
If current is type permissible, then remove blockers with unsuccessful_registration from current.

algorithms.name: dispatch onlocation
algorithms.html: To <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="dispatch-onlocation" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">dispatch onlocation</dfn> for <var>element</var>:

steps.html: Let event be a new Event.
Initialize event with type "onlocation".
Dispatch event to element.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/add a blocker
algorithms.html: To add a blocker with a ActivationBlockersMixinBlockerReason reason and an optional flag expires:

steps.html: Assert: reason is not "". (The empty string in ActivationBlockersMixinBlockerReason signals no blocker is present. Why would you add a non-blocking empty string blocker?)
Let timestamp be None.
If expires, then let timestamp be current high resolution time plus the blocker delay.
Append an entry to the internal [[BlockerList]] with reason and timestamp.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/add an expiring blocker
algorithms.html: To add an expiring blocker with a ActivationBlockersMixinBlockerReason reason:

steps.html: Assert: reason is listed as "expiring" in the blocker reason table.
Add a blocker with reason and true.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/add a temporary blocker
algorithms.html: To add a temporary blocker with a ActivationBlockersMixinBlockerReason reason:

steps.html: Assert: reason is listed as "temporary" in the blocker reason table.
Add a blocker with reason and false.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/add a permanent blocker
algorithms.html: To add a permanent blocker with a ActivationBlockersMixinBlockerReason reason:

steps.html: Assert: reason is listed as "permanent" in the blocker reason table.
Add a blocker with reason and false.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/remove blockers
algorithms.html: To remove blockers with ActivationBlockersMixinBlockerReason reason from an element:

steps.html: Assert: reason is listed as "temporary" in the blocker reason table.
For each entry in element’s [[BlockerList]]:
If entry’s reason equals reason, then remove entry from element’s [[BlockerList]].
Add a blocker with reason and true.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/blocker
algorithms.html: To determine a ActivationBlockersMixin element’s blocker:

steps.html: Let blockers be the result of sorting element’s [[BlockerList]] with the blocker ordering algorithm.
If blockers is not empty and blockers[0] is blocking, then return blockers[0].
Return nothing.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/blocker ordering
algorithms.html:
To determine <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-for="ActivationBlockersMixin" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="activationblockersmixin-blocker-ordering" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">blocker ordering</dfn> for
two blockers <var>a</var> and <var>b</var>:

steps.html: Let really large number be 99.
Assert: No order hint in the blocker reason table is equal to or greater than really large number.
If a is blocking, then let a hint be the order hint of a’s reason in the blocker reason table, otherwise let a hint be really large number.
If b is blocking, then let b hint be the order hint of b’s reason in the blocker reason table, otherwise let b hint be really large number.
Return whether a hint is less than or equal to b hint.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/blocking
algorithms.html: An ActivationBlockersMixin’s blocker list’s entry is blocking if:

steps.html: entry has no blocker timestamp,
or entry has a blocker timestamp, and the blocker timestamp is greater or equal to the current high resolution time.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/isValid
algorithms.html: An ActivationBlockersMixin element’s isValid getter steps are:

steps.html: Return whether element’s blocker is Nothing.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/invalidReason
algorithms.html: An ActivationBlockersMixin element’s invalidReason getter steps are:

steps.html: If element’s blocker is Nothing, return "".
Otherwise, element’s blocker’s reason string.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/maybe dispatch onvalidstatechange
algorithms.html: To <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-for="ActivationBlockersMixin" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="activationblockersmixin-maybe-dispatch-onvalidstatechange" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">maybe dispatch onvalidstatechange</dfn> for <var>element</var>:

steps.html: Let oldState be [[LastNotifiedValidState]].
Let newState be whether element’s blocker is Nothing.
Set [[LastNotifiedValidState]] to newState.
Let oldReason be [[LastNotifiedInvalidReason]].
Let newReason be whether element’s invalidReason.
Set [[LastNotifiedInvalidReason]] to newReason.
If <var>oldState</var> != <var>newState</var> or <var>oldReason</var> != <var>newReason</var>, then:
Let event be a new Event.
Initialize event with type "onvalidationstatuschange", bubbles true, and cancelable true.
Dispatch event to element.

algorithms.name: ActivationBlockersMixin/IntersectionObserver callback
algorithms.html: An ActivationBlockersMixin’s IntersectionObserver callback implements IntersectionObserverCallback and runs the following steps:

steps.html: Assert: The IntersectionObserver’s root is the document
Let entries be the value of the first callback parameter, the list of intersection observer entries.
Assert: entries is not empty.
Let entry be entries’s last item.
If entry.isVisible, then:
Remove blockers with intersection_occluded_or_distorted.
Remove blockers with intersection_out_of_viewport_or_clipped.
Otherwise:
If entry.intersectionRatio >= 1, then:
Let reason be intersection_occluded_or_distorted.
Otherwise:
Let reason be intersection_out_of_viewport_or_clipped.
Add a temporary blocker with reason.
If [[IntersectionRect]] does not equal entry.intersectionRect then add an expiring blocker with intersection_changed.
Set [[IntersectionRect]] to entry.intersectionRect
Maybe dispatch onvalidstatechange on this.

algorithms.name: PowerfulFeatureObserver/initialization steps
algorithms.html: A PowerfulFeatureObserver’s initialization steps are:

steps.html: Assert: The internal [[Features]] slot has been initialized. The including element must define and initialize this.
Initialize the internal [[InitialPermissionStatus]] to the result of get the current permission state.

algorithms.name: PowerfulFeatureObserver/insertion steps
algorithms.html: A PowerfulFeatureObserver’s insertion steps are:

steps.html: If [[Features]] is empty or is null, then add a permanent blocker with reason type_invalid.

algorithms.name: PowerfulFeatureObserver/initialPermissionStatus
algorithms.html: A PowerfulFeatureObserver element’s initialPermissionStatus getter steps are:

steps.html: Return element’s internal [[InitialPermissionStatus]].

algorithms.name: PowerfulFeatureObserver/permissionStatus
algorithms.html: A PowerfulFeatureObserver element’s permissionStatus getter steps are:

steps.html: Return get the current permission state for element.

algorithms.name: PowerfulFeatureObserver/get the current permission state
algorithms.html: To get the current permission state for a PowerfulFeatureObserver element:

steps.html: Let features be element’s internal [[Features]].
If features is null or features is empty, return "prompt".
Let current be "granted".
For each feature of features:
Let state be the result of get the current permission state for feature.

Let current be the smaller of current and state, assuming the following ordering:
"granted" > "prompt" > "denied".
Return current.

algorithms.name: PowerfulFeatureObserver/dispatch onpromptaction
algorithms.html: To <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-for="PowerfulFeatureObserver" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="powerfulfeatureobserver-dispatch-onpromptaction" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">dispatch onpromptaction</dfn> for <var>element</var>:

steps.html: Let event be a new Event.
Initialize event with type "onpromptaction", bubbles true, and cancelable true.
Dispatch event to element.

algorithms.name: PowerfulFeatureObserver/dispatch onpromptdismiss
algorithms.html: To <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-for="PowerfulFeatureObserver" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="powerfulfeatureobserver-dispatch-onpromptdismiss" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">dispatch onpromptdismiss</dfn> for <var>element</var>:

steps.html: Let event be a new Event.
Initialize event with type "onpromptdismiss", bubbles true, and cancelable true.
Dispatch event to element.

algorithms.name: PowerfulFeatureObserver/build a permission descriptor
algorithms.html:
To <dfn class="dfn-paneled has-dfn-panel" data-dfn-for="PowerfulFeatureObserver" data-dfn-type="dfn" data-noexport="" id="powerfulfeatureobserver-build-a-permission-descriptor" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">build a permission descriptor</dfn> for an
<var>element</var>:

steps.html: Let result be a new PermissionDescriptor.
Fill in result, by including the powerful feature names contained in element’s [[Features]].
Return result.

algorithms.html: geolocation elements constrain the styling that can be applied to them. These constraints come in three flavours:

steps.html: If the condition isn’t met, the element is deactivated.
A user-agent defined stylesheet enforces certain styling.
The user-agent enforces bounds on additional styles, where the bounds cannot be easily expressed in CSS. For example, if the style bounds are expressed relative to the computed style of the element.
